intended_use: Automatic Registration is a software device for image guided surgery intended to be used in combination with compatible Brainlab navigation systems such as the Brainlab Spine & Trauma Navigation Syste
intended_use_full: Automatic Registration is a software device for image guided surgery intended to be used in combination with compatible Brainlab navigation systems such as the Brainlab Spine & Trauma Navigation System. Automatic Registration provides an image registration for intraoperatively acquired 3D CT/CBCT or fluoroscopic images.
target_condition: Spine and trauma surgery requiring image-guided navigation
ground_truth: Human cadaver anatomical truth under representative worst-case scenario conditions
other_metrics: Mean navigation accuracy with 3D deviation ≤ 1.5 mm; AI/ML algorithm performance assessed through object detection quantification, vertebra level assignment quality, landmark prediction quality, and observer view direction performance on 2D X-rays
